question: Will Kim Moon-soo be the People's Power Party candidate for president?
resolution_criteria:
An early presidential election will be held in South Korea on 3 June 2025.

This market will resolve according to the candidate selected to represent the The People Power Party (PPP; Korean: 국민의힘) for President of South Korea. 

If a candidate which is not listed is selected, this market will resolve to “Other”. 

If no candidate is selected by June 3, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”. 

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement of the chosen candidate by the The People Power Party, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
